authors.author: Paul Baloche
Paul Baloche
Hosanna (Lob erklingt und Augen schauen zu dir)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2 v2 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Praise is rising, eyes are turning to You, we turn to You Hope is stirring, hearts are yearning for You, we long for You 'Cause when we see You, we find strength to face the day In Your Presence all our fears are washed away, washed away

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hosanna, hosanna You are the God Who saves us, worthy of all our praises Hosanna, hosanna Come have Your way among us We welcome You here, Lord Jesus

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hear the sound of hearts returning to You, we turn to You In Your Kingdom broken lives are made new, You make us new 'Cause when we see You, we find strength to face the day In Your Presence all our fears are washed away, washed away

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 'Cause when we see You, we find strength to face the day In Your Presence all our fears are washed away

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 'Cause when we see You, we find strength to face the day In Your Presence all our fears are washed away, washed away
